title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Sesame essential oils helps with oily hair because it has natural sebum-regulating properties that help to balance the production of oil on the scalp. The antioxidants present in sesame oil also work to absorb excess moisture and purify the hair, leaving it feeling light and non-greasy. Additionally, sesame oil's anti-inflammatory properties can help to soothe and calm an oily scalp, reducing irritation and flakiness.
